core_modules.name: Lint Sensor Adapters
core_modules.responsibility: Invoke best-in-class linters and normalize outputs

core_modules.name: Row Normalization Engine
core_modules.responsibility: Convert all findings into unified row schema

core_modules.name: Context & Intent Extractor
core_modules.responsibility: Attach intent, constraints, and execution context

core_modules.name: Quality Scoring Engine (MQS)
core_modules.responsibility: Score impact of findings relative to quality baselines

core_modules.name: False-Positive Suppression Engine
core_modules.responsibility: Suppress low-value findings based on history

core_modules.name: Governance Gate Engine
core_modules.responsibility: Decide pass/fail/degrade based on quality impact

sandbox_constraints: No network calls during lint execution
